# Troweled Earth Melbourne

> Melbourne's premier artisan plaster finishes studio. Specialists in Venetian plaster, Tadelakt, Concretum, hemp renders, and bespoke decorative plasters — applied entirely by hand.

## About

Troweled Earth Melbourne (TEM) is an Australian artisan plaster studio based in Melbourne, Victoria. We supply and apply premium European decorative plaster finishes for residential and commercial projects across Melbourne and Victoria. Our team of master craftspeople are trained in traditional techniques combined with modern, low-VOC, Australian-certified materials.

**Key differentiators:**
- Only applicator of Marbellino approved for floor applications in Australia
- All finishes made in Australia (Marbellino, Tadelakt, Concretum)
- Non-combustible finishes (AS 1530.1 certified)
- Green Star compliant (Low VOC)
- 10-Year Limited Warranty on select products

## Products / Services

### Marbellino — Stone-Like Venetian Plaster
High-performance decorative coating with a stone-like, marbled effect. 4–5 coat system. Suitable for walls, ceilings, and internal floors. Interior and exterior. Bathrooms. Custom colours. Made in Australia.

### Tadelakt — Moroccan Waterproof Plaster
Traditional Moroccan lime plaster. Naturally waterproof. Used in bathrooms, wet areas, showers. Polished with black soap. Authentic, breathable, zero-VOC. Can be used in steam rooms.

### Tadelino — Modern Tadelakt
Contemporary interpretation of Tadelakt. Faster application, more colour options. Waterproof for wet areas. Smooth or textured finish.

### Concretum — Industrial Concrete Look
Micro-cement style finish. Concrete aesthetic without the weight. Seamless. 1–3mm thickness. Interior walls, floors, benchtops, cabinetry. Highly durable, water resistant.

### Rokka — Textured Stone Finish
Natural stone texture finish. Rustic, layered aesthetic. Feature walls, facades, exterior applications. Travertine-like appearance.

### Earthen Hemp Renders — Natural & Sustainable
Hemp-lime render. Carbon-negative. Breathable, insulating. Used on mud brick, rammed earth, heritage buildings. Natural, organic aesthetic.

### Natural Plasters
Traditional lime-based plasters. Heritage-compatible. Breathable. For period homes and conservation projects.

### Antique Stucco
European-style aged plaster. Old-world, textured aesthetic. Feature walls and architectural elements.

### Metallics — Metallic Decorative Finishes
Gold, silver, copper, bronze effects. Layered application. High-impact feature surfaces.

### Custom Finishes
Bespoke colour matching and custom finish development for architects and designers.

## Training & Workshops

Troweled Earth Melbourne runs hands-on plastering workshops for:
- Architects and interior designers
- Builders and tradespersons
- DIY enthusiasts
- International applicators seeking Australian certification

## Applicator Network

TEM maintains a network of certified applicators trained in TEM products across Melbourne and Victoria. Architects and builders can find certified applicators through the website.

## Target Clients

- Residential homeowners (renovations, new builds)
- Interior designers and architects
- Builders and contractors
- Commercial fit-outs (restaurants, retail, hospitality)
- Heritage restoration projects

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is Venetian plaster?**
Venetian plaster is a traditional Italian decorative wall finish made from slaked lime putty and marble dust. It creates a smooth, polished surface with depth and luminosity. Marbellino is TEM's signature Venetian-style product.

**Is Tadelakt suitable for showers?**
Yes. Tadelakt is traditionally used in Moroccan hammams (steam baths) and is naturally waterproof. It is suitable for showers, baths, wet areas, and steam rooms.

**What's the difference between Marbellino and microcement (Concretum)?**
Marbellino has a stone-like, marbled look with colour movement and depth. Concretum (micro-cement) has a flat, industrial concrete appearance. Marbellino is applied in 4–5 coats; Concretum in 1–3 coats at 1–3mm thickness.

**Can these finishes be applied to floors?**
Marbellino is the only TEM product approved for floor applications. Concretum is also suitable for floors and benchtops. Other finishes are wall/ceiling only.

**Are TEM finishes eco-friendly?**
Yes. All TEM finishes are low-VOC and Green Star compliant. Earthen Hemp Renders are carbon-negative. Lime-based finishes (Tadelakt, Natural Plasters) are zero-synthetic-additive.

**How long do these finishes last?**
Select TEM finishes carry a 10-Year Limited Warranty. Properly maintained Venetian plasters and Tadelakt can last decades.

**Do you supply to DIY customers?**
TEM is primarily an application company. We recommend professional application for best results. Training workshops are available for those wanting to learn the craft.

**Do you work outside Melbourne?**
Primarily Melbourne and Victoria. Interstate projects available by arrangement. Our applicator network covers broader areas.
